text: There is a peculiar energy in this space, something forward-looking yet anxious. Surrounded by glass, bright colors, and echoing footsteps, I feel the weight of innovation, but also a faint disquiet at the curated sterility – a reminder of the distance between the living, unpredictable world and the ideal of rational order. The R+D wall promises progress, yet the blank screens hint at the ambivalence of technological aspiration. I am both intrigued and unsettled.
